streams.readings: CREATE STREAM readings (deviceId string, temperature float, smokeLevel float, timestampUtc string) WITH (DATASOURCE="iot/smoke/readings", FORMAT="json")

rules.smoke_alert_rule: {"id":"smoke_alert_rule","sql":"SELECT deviceId, temperature, smokeLevel, timestampUtc FROM readings WHERE smokeLevel >= 70","actions":[{"mqtt":{"server":"tcp://mosquitto:1883","topic":"iot/smoke/events","qos":1,"sendSingle":true,"dataTemplate":"{{toJson .}}"}}]}
